name: Biel Xifre-Vidal
summary: Highly experienced Platform Engineer with over 8 years of expertise in designing scalable cloud-native architectures and automating CI/CD pipelines. Proven track record in optimizing Kubernetes clusters and implementing robust infrastructure-as-code practices to enhance developer productivity.

experience.title: Senior Platform Engineer
experience.description: Lead the migration of legacy monolithic services to a microservices architecture on AWS using Kubernetes. Implemented GitOps workflows with ArgoCD and reduced deployment times by 40 percent.

experience.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
experience.description: Managed multi-region cloud infrastructure and developed internal tooling using Go to automate resource provisioning. Improved system reliability by implementing comprehensive observability stacks.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Maintained CI/CD pipelines and managed containerized environments for high-traffic web applications. Collaborated with development teams to streamline local development environments.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Informatics Engineering
